info.title: Grimmory API
info.description:
> [!warning]
> This documentation is auto-generated and public, but the API is unstable; to join the conversation around changes to the API, visit our [GitHub](https://github.com/grimmory-tools/grimmory) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/9YJ7HB4n8T).

REST API documentation for managing libraries, readers, metadata, and device integrations in Grimmory.

tags.name: Komga API
tags.description: Komga-compatible API endpoints. All endpoints support a 'clean' query parameter (default: false). When present (?clean or ?clean=true), responses exclude fields ending with 'Lock', null values, and empty arrays, resulting in smaller and cleaner JSON payloads.

get.description: Catch-all endpoint for unhandled Kobo API requests.

put.description: Catch-all endpoint for unhandled Kobo API requests.

post.description: Catch-all endpoint for unhandled Kobo API requests.

delete.description: Catch-all endpoint for unhandled Kobo API requests.

patch.description: Catch-all endpoint for unhandled Kobo API requests.
